# Scrap Trader

The Scrap Trader can be found in the [Jawa Sandcrawler](../planets/jawa-sandcrawler.md).

<img width="700" height="400" alt="image" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/05e81c09-4b71-4bd1-89d7-c1efad1f7bf6" />

## Trades

The Scrap Trader sells various things in exchange for Scrap:
